response:
Nurse Emily organizes a creative writing workshop for the older adults in her care facility, ensuring that every resident has the opportunity to participate. She divides the 24 interested residents into groups of 6, resulting in 4 groups. For each group, Emily prepares 3 writing prompts, making a total of 12 prompts for the initial session. 

To accommodate the possibility that groups may want to continue writing, Emily has also prepared an additional set of 10 extra prompts. These are to be shared equally among all the groups. 

Emily ensures that the prompts are accessible and varied, and she maintains a well-organized library of writing materials. She also keeps a separate library of backup prompts in case of any unforeseen circumstances. 

In total, Emily will need to have prepared 12 initial prompts plus 10 extra prompts, resulting in 22 writing prompts for the session. 

The END.
